channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Wilson scores 31 and Aces win 3rd WNBA title in 4 seasons, beating Mercury 97-86 for 4-game sweep
item.description: PHOENIX (AP) — A'ja Wilson put in work in the paint, getting bucket after bucket despite multiple defenders draped all over her. She got plenty of help from Chelsea Gray, Jewell Loyd and Dana Evans. The trio started raining 3s early in the second quarter.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BRANDT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: WNBA Commissioner Cathy Engelbert booed by crowd, flipped off while presenting WNBA championship trophy
item.description: Cathy Engelbert faced a hostile reception amid ongoing controversy over alleged dismissive comments about WNBA players and Caitlin Clark.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: How to watch the 49ers vs. the Buccaneers on Sunday
item.description: The San Francisco 49ers battle the Tampa Bay Buccaneers on Sunday, Oct. 12 at 1:25 p.m. PDT at Raymond James Stadium in Tampa.
item.dc:creator: Pueng Vongs, The Mercury News

item.title: Hasso Plattner sums up what his expectations are for the Sharks this season
item.description: NHL: After finishing in last place in back-to-back seasons, San Jose Sharks need to improve in 2025-26
item.dc:creator: Curtis Pashelka, The Mercury News

item.title: Penn State seeks rebound against Northwestern: Nittany Nation
item.description: STATE COLLEGE, Pa. (AP) — The pain and anger was just beginning for Penn State players as handfuls of UCLA fans stormed the Rose Bowl to celebrate their Bruins’ upset win on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: TRAVIS JOHNSON, PHL 17

item.title: Family affair: Vacherot stuns Djokovic and will face cousin Rinderknech in Shanghai Masters final
item.description: Two cousins will meet in the final of the Shanghai Open after qualifier Valentin Vacherot stunned a hobbled Novak Djokovic and relative Arthur Rinderknech fought back to beat Daniil Medvedev.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Polanco hits winning single in the 15th inning as the Mariners beat the Tigers to advance to ALCS
item.description: SEATTLE (AP) — Jorge Polanco hit a game-ending single in the 15th inning, and the Seattle Mariners advanced to the AL Championship Series by outlasting the Detroit Tigers for a 3-2 victory Friday night in the longest winner-take-all postseason game in baseball history.
item.dc:creator: LUKE OLSON, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Caleb Williams joins investment group backing NWSL's Boston Legacy FC
item.description: Caleb Williams and his investment firm, 888 Meidas, have joined the investment group of the Boston Legacy Football Club, a soon-to-be member of the National Women's Soccer League, alongside other notable athletes and celebrities.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Angel Reese to make history as first professional athlete in Victoria's Secret Fashion Show
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Angel Reese is getting a pair of wings. The Chicago Sky star announced on Instagram that she will be walking in the upcoming Victoria's Secret Fashion Show on Oct. 15. It will be the first time a professional athlete will walk the runway in the show.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Family ties fuel Grand Junction volleyball’s Ludlam sisters
item.description: The Ludlam sisters have been playing volleyball together for Grand Junction High School, and their lifelong bond has created a strong chemistry on the court that has been key to the team's success this season.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Turnover battle, stopping the run front of mind for Ben Johnson heading into Commanders matchup
item.description: The Chicago Bears are preparing to face the Washington Commanders in a high-stakes matchup, with Head Coach Ben Johnson emphasizing the importance of taking care of the football and containing the Commanders' dangerous run game.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Cubs stave off elimination with 4-3 win over Brewers in Game 3 of NLDS
item.description: CHICAGO (AP/WGN) — The Chicago Cubs staved off elimination with a 4-3 win over the Milwaukee Brewers in Game 3 of the NLDS Wednesday night at Wrigley Field. Pete Crow-Armstrong's two-out swing was part of a four-run first inning for Chicago — continuing a wild trend.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Hulu not moving forward with UNC football documentary: Report
item.description: Hulu's planned season-long documentary on North Carolina football's first season under head coach Bill Belichick is no longer moving forward, according to a report.
item.dc:creator: Hannah Leyva, NewsNation

item.title: Mark Sanchez case 'rubs me the wrong way:' Attorney Jose Baez
item.description: Celebrity attorney Jose Baez said that the drug test results requested by police will play a pivotal role in the Sanchez case.
item.dc:creator: Rob Taub, NewsNation

item.title: Son of 1st Bucs head coach speaks on his father's legacy
item.description: News Channel 8 sat down with John's son, former Bucs general manager and current Falcons president Rich McKay, to learn about his father's life and his impact on the team's history.
item.dc:creator: Will Richardson, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Panthers celebrate Stanley Cup win with banner ceremony, eye historic three-peat as NHL kings
item.description: SUNRISE, Fla. (AP) — There are a couple of minor dings these days in the Stanley Cup, including one right near the spot where the names of the 2024-25 Florida Panthers are etched in commemoration of their latest title. Such things happen during championship celebrations.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: 3 problems for the Bears to solve ahead of their rematch with the Commanders
item.description: The Chicago Bears are struggling on both sides of the ball, with a poor run game, penalty problems, and a front seven that is struggling to stop the run and apply pressure to the quarterback, but reinforcements are on the way with Kyler Gordon and TJ Edwards expected to return for Week 6.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: LeBron James' 'decision' announcement is just an ad
item.description: James, 40, is the NBA’s oldest player and is about to set a record by appearing in his 23rd season in the league.
item.dc:creator: Talia Naquin, NewsNation

item.title: Mammoth GM hopes to sign Logan Cooley to long-term deal
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - After four years of rebuilding, if the Utah Mammoth don't make the NHL playoffs this season, would it be a disappointment? "Yes, I think we would," said general manager Bill Armstrong.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
